title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Applied Claude review findings to response-contract hardening. Embedded communication-signal schema now explicitly prohibits engine-enriched fields while retaining forward-compatible additional properties. validate-response now maps missing/unreadable source paths to source_read/source_extraction_failed exit 4 instead of unexpected_error. Updated contract/workflow/skills for the source-read branch and synced installed skill copies. Verification: 157 tests passed, py_compile passed, diff check clean.
open_questions: What are the true occurrence dates for the three low_confidence_meeting_date artifacts (nitesh follow-up, wide-orbit orchestration, fable-5 workflow review)?
Should doctor distinguish advisory issues from failures so low_confidence_meeting_date does not force exit 1 (final-review finding)?
next_actions: Working tree is ready for a final review-before-commit decision. Then commit the response-contract hardening block and begin Layer 5A schema 1.1/reviewed identity.
continuation_hint: Next: Working tree is ready for a final review-before-commit decision. Then commit the response-contract hardening block and begin Layer 5A schema 1.1/reviewed identity.
